title: Polish Potato and Tender Toast
description: A hearty breakfast dish featuring tender meat, potatoes, and crispy toast.
instructions: Cook the diced potato in boiling water until tender, about 10-12 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Cook the Polish sausage in a pan over medium heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Toast the bread slices until crispy and lightly browned.
Slice the cooked sausage into thin strips.
Combine the cooked potato, sausage, and toasted bread in a bowl.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
